allow: Bash(ssh root@5.178.87.159 "openssl s_client -connect messenger.nikitakh.ru:443 -servername messenger.nikitakh.ru 2>&1 </dev/null | grep -E '\(issuer|subject|Verify|depth|Certificate chain|OK|error\)' | head -20")
Bash(ssh root@5.178.87.159 "cd /opt/minimum && docker compose ps && docker compose logs backend --tail=30")

Bash(ssh root@5.178.87.159 "nginx -t && journalctl -u nginx --no-pager -n 20 2>/dev/null || docker logs $\(docker ps -q -f name=nginx\) --tail=20 2>/dev/null || cat /var/log/nginx/error.log | tail -20")

Bash(ssh root@5.178.87.159 "docker exec minimum-frontend-1 curl -s http://backend:8000/api/v1/auth/login -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\\"username\\":\\"a\\",\\"password\\":\\"a\\"}' -w '\\nHTTP:%{http_code}'")
Bash(ssh root@5.178.87.159 "docker exec minimum-frontend-1 nginx -t && docker exec minimum-frontend-1 cat /var/log/nginx/error.log 2>&1 | tail -10")

Bash(ssh root@5.178.87.159 "docker exec minimum-frontend-1 nginx -s reload && sleep 2 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://127.0.0.1:3002/api/v1/auth/login -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\\"username\\":\\"a\\",\\"password\\":\\"a\\"}'")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@5.178.87.159 "cd /opt/minimum && git reset --hard origin/main && docker compose build frontend && docker compose up -d frontend 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@5.178.87.159 "cd /opt/minimum && docker compose build frontend 2>&1 | grep -v '^#' | grep -E 'error|Error' | head -20")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@5.178.87.159 "cd /opt/minimum && git log --oneline -3 && git show HEAD:frontend/src/pages/chats/ChatsPage.tsx | grep -n 'isGroup' | head -10")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@5.178.87.159 "cd /opt/minimum && git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/main && git log --oneline -3")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@5.178.87.159 "cd /opt/minimum && docker compose build frontend 2>&1 | tail -5 && docker compose up -d frontend 2>&1 | tail -3")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@5.178.87.159 "cat /etc/caddy/Caddyfile 2>/dev/null || cat /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/* 2>/dev/null || caddy version 2>/dev/null")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@5.178.87.159 "sed -i 's|proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3002|proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3000|g' /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/messenger && nginx -t && systemctl reload nginx && echo 'OK'")
